checkin.journal:
Sleeping good until 7 you can tell I am chronically missing some sleep, regeneration will be better too, the Uncle Lojze dream wow - what a thing I was crying like a baby
Easy morning - was really vividly dreaming Načeloma ne razlagam svojih sanj okoli ampak tole me je pa čist sezul.Torej, v sanjah sm stal pred hišo v budni vasi in razmišljal da je tolk veliko skor kuker vila v Dubaju. Gledal sem jo od zunaj in se je zdele ful velika. Da bi zmeril koliko m2 ima sm zmeril tko s koraki un del ob c
